prior_findings:
Plan P1 (sec-gov): 0 must-fix, 2 should-fix (lifecycle prevent_destroy, diagnostic settings), 1 suggestion (KV network ACLs). PASS.
Plan P2 (arch-rel): 0 must-fix, 1 should-fix (health check endpoint), 2 suggestions (single-region doc, SQL auto-pause). PASS.

findings.title: Log Analytics 30-day retention is sufficient for dev
findings.description: 30-day retention aligns with dev cost optimization. For production, 90+ days would be needed for compliance (PCI DSS audit policy).
findings.recommendation: Parameterize retention_in_days via variable with dev=30, prod=90 defaults.

findings.title: Consider App Insights daily cap alert
findings.description: 0.5 GB daily cap is set but no alert is configured when the cap is reached. Telemetry silently stops when cap hits.
findings.recommendation: Add an alert rule for daily cap reached, or document the behavior for the operations team.

compact_for_parent: Plan P3 (cost): 0 must-fix, 0 should-fix, 2 suggestions (parameterize retention, daily cap alert). PASS.
